creator: rfg@tristatelogic.com
text:
Install of the xbmc port does not seem to install any man page for xbmc.

Fix: 

Somebody obviously needs to write a man page for xbmc.

Here is some material that may perhaps serve as a starting point:

  http://manpages.ubuntu.com/manpages/precise/man1/xbmc.bin.1.html

(Note however that the above is for xbmc.bin... *not* xbmc.)
How-To-Repeat: 
portinstall xbmc
man xbmc
